body:
emilygaming:

When she calls you “dork” and you realize

Oh

She really likes you

Wait? This is a thing? What if she called me both a dork and a goober in less than a 12 hour period?
reblog_comment: Wait? This is a thing? What if she called me both a dork and a goober in less than a 12 hour period?
